description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python codeqa/test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow consists of four jobs: flake8, mypy, test, and coveralls. The flake8 job checks code style with Flake8, the mypy job checks types with Mypy, the test job runs tests with pytest on multiple OS and Python versions, and the coveralls job finishes the Coveralls report.
